prose:
Method–provenance block
• Property: furan frontier orbital energies (HOMO, LUMO) and Koopmans-style HOMO–LUMO gap.
• Level of theory: DFT, tier `standard` → B3LYP/def2-TZVP with density fitting (PySCF backend).
• Geometry provenance: fixed coordinates from /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz; single-point energy/orbital calculation (DFT//input-geom).
• Environment: gas phase (no implicit solvation model).
• Charge 0, multiplicity 1 (closed-shell RKS).
• Software/version: chemkit frontier-orbitals skill (PySCF inside). SCF converged in 9 cycles.
• Convergence: scf_converged = true; integrity.status = ok, trustworthy = true.
• Warnings: no warnings reported by the engine (result JSON `warnings` array empty).
• Live log path was announced at launch; final JSON saved to /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp8z72e155/live.json.

Results (gas phase)
HOMO energy  = –6.3597638 eV
LUMO energy  = –0.1024036 eV
HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.2573602 eV  ← headline value
